ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_facilities" (
  "facility_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each health facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the health facility */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Address of the health facility */,
  "facility_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the health facility */,
  "facility_email" TEXT /* Email address of the health facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awc_cases" (
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* ID of the case associated with the woman/mother */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the record */,
  "age_in_months" INTEGER /* Age in months of the woman/mother at the time of registration */,
  "ccs_status" TEXT /* CCS status (e.g., pregnant, lactating, other) */,
  "open_in_month" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case was opened in the month */,
  "alive_in_month" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is alive in the month */,
  "trimester" INTEGER /* Trimester of the pregnancy */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* Reference to the health facility where the case was registered */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who registered the case */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("awc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awc_cases_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES health_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awc_cases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services_distributed" (
  "service_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "num_rations_distributed" INTEGER /* Number of nutritional rations distributed to the mother */,
  "thr_eligible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is eligible for the THR program */,
  "tetanus_complete" INTEGER /* Indicates if tetanus vaccination is complete */,
  "delivered_in_month" INTEGER /* Indicates if the delivery occurred in the month */,
  "ifa_supplied" INTEGER /* Indicates if IFA supplements were supplied */,
  "ifa_consumed" INTEGER /* Indicates if IFA supplements were consumed */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who provided the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_distributed_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_distributed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anc_visits" (
  "visit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "anc1_received_at_delivery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the first antenatal care visit was received at delivery */,
  "anc2_received_at_delivery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the second antenatal care visit was received */,
  "anc3_received_at_delivery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the third antenatal care visit was received */,
  "anc4_received_at_delivery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fourth antenatal care visit was received */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who conducted the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anc_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anc_visits_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each nutrition record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "using_ifa" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is using iron-folic acid supplements */,
  "ifa_consumed_last_seven_days" INTEGER /* Count of IFA doses consumed in the last seven days */,
  "anemic_severe" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is severely anemic */,
  "anemic_moderate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is moderately anemic */,
  "nutrition_date" TEXT /* Date of the nutrition assessment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who conducted the nutrition assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anemia_status" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each anemia status record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "anemic_normal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is normal in terms of anemia */,
  "anemic_unknown" INTEGER /* Indicates if the anemia status is unknown */,
  "extra_meal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is receiving an extra meal */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the anemia status assessment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who conducted the anemia status assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anemia_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anemia_status_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_visits" (
  "visit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "bp_visited_in_month" INTEGER /* Indicates if the BP check was conducted in the month */,
  "pnc_visited_in_month" INTEGER /* Indicates if the PNC visit was conducted in the month */,
  "trimester_2" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is in the second trimester */,
  "trimester_3" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother is in the third trimester */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who conducted the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_visits_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counseling_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each counseling session record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "counsel_immediate_bf" INTEGER /* Indicates if immediate breastfeeding counseling was conducted */,
  "counsel_bp_vid" INTEGER /* Indicates if counseling for blood pressure was conducted */,
  "counsel_preparation" INTEGER /* Indicates if preparation counseling was conducted */,
  "counsel_fp_vid" INTEGER /* Indicates if family planning counseling was conducted */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the counseling session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who conducted the counseling session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counseling_sessions_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counseling_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postnatal_care" (
  "care_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each postnatal care record */,
  "awc_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unique case record */,
  "pnc_complete" INTEGER /* Indicates if postnatal care was completed */,
  "postnatal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother has received postnatal care */,
  "has_aadhar_id" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mother has an Aadhar ID */,
  "care_date" TEXT /* Date of the postnatal care */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who provided the postnatal care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("care_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postnatal_care_awc_id FOREIGN KEY ("awc_id") REFERENCES awc_cases ("awc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postnatal_care_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
